name_en: 2️⃣5️⃣C Most Explosive 🔥 Chanel Cowhide Hobo. Chanel chanel hobo small size. Retro gold coin button drawstring. Classic chain design, full of high-end feel! Essential for daily travel, exquisite appearance, delicate texture, easily handles both casual and formal occasions, a showstopper on the runway. 🔥 Unique design, quite a domineering style, super large capacity easily holds daily needs ❕ Shopping and travel are high-value companions. Dimensions: 30*26*14 cm. Model: AS5293. Color: Black oiled leather / Gold buckle.
